titleStmt.title: SII 22.175: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 175. (A.R. No. 175 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. ACHCHINDA (ACHYUTA)DĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—ŚAKA 1453.

summary.p: The date is given as Khara, Dhanus, śu. 2, Sunday, Uttirāḍam (A.D. 1531, Decr. 10).

This records the grant of certain taxes by the Nāṭṭavar of the Twelve-Paṟṟus of Iṟaivānaraiyūr except that on the sale of horses (kudirai-kāṇikkai ?) amounting to 36 poṉ and 5(1/4) paṇam, from Kumiḻi in Paḻaṅgūr-paṟṟu, for the requirements of worship in the temple of Narasiṅgamuḍaiya-Nayinār at Tirukkōvalūr. Reference is made to the consecration of god Narasiṅga-Munaiyadaraiya-Perumāḷ in the temple. The gift is said to have been made by Kachchirāyar on behalf of the Nāṭṭavar in the presence of Bhōgaiyadēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvaraṉ Ariyarāyavipāṭa
ṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa
ṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu koṭātāṉ metiṉimicurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri
cāḷuvaṉ tulukkar Oṭṭiyartaḷavipāṭaṉ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭa rā
rātirācaṉ rācaparamecuraṉ śrīvirappiratāpaṉ virakecari pūṟuvatekṣiṇa
paccima Uttara catucamuttiṟātipati kecaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrī Accinta
tevamahārāyar piṟutuvi Irācciyampaṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam [10 4]5 10 3
Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa kara caṅvarcarattu taṉunāyaṟṟu pūṟuva
pakṣattu dvitiyaiyum bhāṉuvāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattinnāḷ malā
ṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭup pāṉūrkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaivā
naraiyūril paṉṉiraṇṭupaṟṟil nāṭṭavarum tirukkovalūr Uṭaiyār
naraciṅkamuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil caṇṭecura nayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku
taṟmacātaṉappaṭṭayam kuṭuttapaṭi Iṉṉayiṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa paḻa
ṅkūrpaṟṟil kumiḻicer coḻapāṇṭiyapurattil kutiraikkāṇikkaiāka E
ṅkaḷ cirmaiyil rekai patiñca poṉ 3 10 6 5va Inta poṉ muppattāṟum pa
ṇam Āñcekālum kaḻittukkoṇṭu Iṉṉayiṉār pūjai tiru
ppaṇi naṭattaveṇṭi naraciṅka muṉaiyataraiyap perumāḷ nayiṉāraiyu
m Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇikkoṇṭu tāṉattārumpar nilamumāka Iṟaivā narai
yūrile varukaiyil śrīmaṉmaṇṭalecuraṉ timma(ppa ?)yarācāviṉ vira puttiraṉ po
kaiyatevamahārācāviṉ muṉpāka paṉṉiraṇṭupaṟṟil nayiṉār kaccirāya
rum nāṭṭavarkaḷum Inta rekaipoṉ muppattāṟum paṇam Añcekā
lum paṉṉiraṇṭupaṟṟilum nāṅkaḷ Iṟuppatāka patiñcukoṇṭu E
ṅkaḷ nayiṉār naraciṅkamuṭaiya nayiṉāṟku caṟuvamāṉṉiyamāka tiruppu ka
tāraivārttu Inta kutiraik kāṇikkai kaḻittukkuṭuttom Inta
caṟuvamāṉiyam cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Intappaṭikku
kkumutappaṭaiyilum kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Inta caṟuvamāṉiyattukku A
kitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ keṅkaikkaraiyile kāṟāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāva
ttile pokakkaṭavanākavum taṉ mātā pitāvukku Iraṇṭu niṉaitta pāvat
tile pokakkaṭavanākavum Ivai kaccirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cavuntara pāṇṭiya maṉaimu
ṉṉāyan Eḻuttu kāṭṭu mayiluṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai koṅkarāyar Eḻuttu viraca
mpavāṇṭāyar Eḻuttu Ivai tirumuṭikkāriyār Eḻuttu kurukulat taraiyar E
ḻuttu muṭikoṇṭa veḷār Eḻuttu kurukularāyar Eḻuttu [rājarāja] veḷār Eḻuttu Ivai
paṉṉiraṇṭupaṟṟu nāṭṭuk kaṇakkappiḷḷai Eḻuttu paḻaṅkūṟpaṟṟu nāṭṭuk
kaṇakku puḻuviṉaipperumāḷ Eḻuttu śrī paramecurarakṣai śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 22.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
